name: leaguelore-import-helper-repo
description: Desktop ESPN import helper for LeagueLore.

scripts.dev: npm run build:contract && npm -w apps/desktop run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:contract && npm -w apps/desktop run build
scripts.make: npm run build:contract && npm -w apps/desktop run make
scripts.package: npm run build:contract && npm -w apps/desktop run package
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contract && npm --workspaces run typecheck
scripts.build:contract: npm -w packages/import-contract run build && npm -w packages/import-contract run schema
